product_overview: CMTX AX Planner OS is an enterprise strategy platform for semiconductor R&D and industry trend analysis. It provides interactive intelligence views and government grant information in a premium dashboard experience.
core_goals: Review industry intelligence and competitor activity in an interactive dashboard
Browse government grant and policy information with quick access to supporting details
Distinguish between guest and administrator access states within the app

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: Provides a high-level landing page for the platform with quick access to core intelligence areas.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View the dashboard overview -> Identify available intelligence sections

features.name: Competitor Intelligence
features.description: Lets users track competitors and compare market signals through interactive intelligence views.
user_flows: Navigate to /intelligence -> View competitor radar chart -> Compare competitors in the comparison matrix -> See real-time signal updates

features.name: GR Hub
features.description: Lets users review government grants and policy information from a dedicated hub.
user_flows: Navigate to /gr -> Browse the grant and policy hub -> Open an item to review its details -> View the source link and AI summary

features.name: Competitor Intelligence
user_interactions: Compare competitors in the comparison matrix
